ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that Ms. Dolch opted to pay the court fine and fee so that Mr. Flockton would get out, get a job, and get off of SSI. In addition, he stated that the credit cards were used by Mr. Flockton to pay for food and personal needs when he gets off of SSI, that it puts them in a tough situation, that they sent a form letter to SSI regarding: the food, shelter, etc. that it is paid for, that the payment is worth it even though there is a reduction in SSI, and that it has been a balancing act. Mr. Der confirmed for the Court that this matter would be transferred. The Court set status on the filing of a Motion to Change Venue for August 24, 2009. The Court noted that it had received the document stating that Ms. Dolch is willing to step down. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy S. McDaniels.

Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Feder appearing for petitioner. Proof of disability was filed last week. Matter granted. Order signed. Bond is fixed in the amount of $260,000.00. First account must be filed by 1/28/2008. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
